title: Cowboy Bebop
sourceNotes: Anime-original 1998 series (26 eps). Paired with the Cain Kuga manga adaptation (11 chapters / 3 vols, 1999) which retells select arcs and adds side stories. No tight chapter-to-episode correspondence; the anime is the canonical telling. Shooting Star (id 30174) is a separate prequel manga.

movies.title: Cowboy Bebop: The Movie - Knockin' on Heaven's Door
movies.note: Side story set between eps 22 and 23.
